results.title: Buy William Contreras, sell Seiya Suzuki, hold Kazuma Okamoto in fantasy baseball

results.title: Rebecca Lowe shares reaction to Zlatan Ibrahimovic’s shock Fox World Cup exit announcement
results.description: REBECCA LOWE has shared insight into Fox co-star Zlatan Ibrahimovic's shock exit announcement after the World Cup. It was an emotional end to the tournament for the Fox anchor with Lowe seen fighting back tears as she signed off their coverage.
